subject: A hulking Gruul berserker mid-charge, swinging an oversized weapon in a brutal arc
description: A muscular brute of a warrior surges forward in a violent two-handed swing of a massive club or maul. The figure is heavily built with bare arms and a wild, primal silhouette consistent with Ravnica's Gruul Clans. Motion blur and dust streak across the foreground as the weapon arcs. The palette is dominated by dirty reds, ochres, and warm browns with soot and smoke smudging the rear of the frame. The framing is dynamic, action-oriented, with the figure pitched forward and to the right of center.
foreground: berserker swinging a large club or warhammer, mid-stride
background: smoky, debris-filled urban ruin or battle haze
